title: Restore GFM and consolidate authoring around fire
description: Restore GFM as the default Markdown behavior and replace the built-in authoring component Fragment with Fire, while leaving the unresolved $fire and list shorthand decisions explicit.
acceptance_criteria: Tables, task lists, strikethrough, and autolinks compile by default; generated fire syntax targets Fire and direct <Fire> works; <Fragment> is no longer a built-in authoring component; docs recommend fire-based syntax and accurately label the remaining shorthand decisions; package and docs checks pass.
close_reason: GFM is enabled in both compilation paths, Fire replaces the built-in Fragment authoring component, docs and examples use Fire, compatibility decisions are tracked in hono-slides-7nq, and package/docs checks pass.

title: Add browserless OGP generation recipe and example
description: Provide an executable examples/ogp project and documentation recipe that generate deck social images at build time with Satori and resvg while keeping hono-decks core free of those dependencies. Extend configured decks metadata or paths only where the example reveals a stable missing primitive.
design: Keep satori and @resvg/resvg-js scoped to examples/ogp. Use the public hono-decks/node compile APIs, emit PNG files into Workers Static Assets, and use the same mount path and deck metadata as the configured runtime kit. Preserve a clear boundary between the existing LinkCard OGP cache and deck social-image generation.
acceptance_criteria: examples/ogp builds deck modules and a deterministic 1200x630 PNG without Browser Rendering; the PNG is served as a static asset; the viewer emits correct OGP/Twitter metadata with an absolute image URL; dependencies do not enter packages/decks; docs explain fonts, build/watch integration, and customization; targeted and repository checks pass.
close_reason: Implemented and verified browserless build-time OGP generation, static asset serving, social metadata, docs, and example.

title: Auto-reload browsers after deck recompilation
description: Deck edits regenerate modules but require a manual Cmd+R. Send an explicit Vite full-reload after successful watch compilation and enable Wrangler browser live reload in development scripts, while avoiding reloads during the initial build.
design: Keep generated-module compilation as-is, then notify the active Vite client with server.ws full-reload. Use Wrangler's official --live-reload dev flag for direct Worker examples.
acceptance_criteria: Saving an MDX deck sends a Vite full-reload after successful compilation; failed compilations do not reload; recovery reloads after the next successful compile; Wrangler example dev commands enable live reload; tests and real development smoke checks pass.
close_reason: Implemented and verified Vite full reload and Wrangler live reload integration.

title: Integrate deck authoring into existing dev commands
description: Make the normal Hono development command compile and watch deck sources without a separate hono-decks watch process. Add a Vite plugin for HonoX/Vite, configure Wrangler custom builds for Worker examples, simplify scripts/docs, and verify live rebuild behavior.
design: Use build-tool lifecycle hooks rather than a new dev command: hono-decks/vite for Vite/HonoX and Wrangler build.command plus build.watch_dir for direct Wrangler projects.
acceptance_criteria: bun run dev triggers an initial deck compile; editing an MDX deck regenerates generated modules under both Vite and Wrangler development paths; build/deploy paths compile automatically; examples and docs no longer require a separate decks:watch command; tests and smoke checks pass.
close_reason: Implemented Vite and Wrangler dev lifecycle integration; verified initial compile, live MDX rebuilds, builds, tests, and standalone package.

title: Redesign pre-release API and developer workflow
description: Replace the pre-release public API without compatibility constraints: make one config drive compile/runtime mount settings, add a configured deck kit and complete path API, standardize resolver inputs, add CLI watch and zero-argument scaffolding, narrow public exports with JSDoc, migrate examples/docs, and align Worker examples with current Cloudflare practices.
acceptance_criteria: One config drives CLI and runtime; generated createDecks(config) is the primary API; watch mode recompiles deck edits; resolver and path APIs are consistent; root exports are curated; examples/docs use the new API; Worker configs/types follow current guidance; all checks and smoke tests pass.
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix slides missing from browser print output
description: Investigate the print route under browser print media, ensure Cmd+P renders slide content, add regression coverage, verify print output, then stop the active Quick Tunnel.
acceptance_criteria: Print route shows slides under print media; regression tests pass; rendered print output is verified; Quick Tunnel is stopped after completion.
close_reason: Fixed print CSS specificity and print layout flow, added Cmd/Ctrl+P routing to the A4 print page with automatic print dialog, verified Chrome PDF output and all 201 tests.

title: Adjust viewer controls for mobile fullscreen and desktop print
description: Hide fullscreen controls on coarse-pointer smartphone layouts and add a desktop-only default print-route control that participates in viewer control ordering, labels, hiding, and rendering APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Fullscreen and print controls are hidden on coarse pointers; desktop viewer links to printPath; control APIs and tests cover print.
close_reason: Added the default desktop print-route control and coarse-pointer CSS hiding print/fullscreen; updated docs and verified all tests plus live Tunnel output.

title: Align mobile landscape click overlays with slide frame
description: Move transparent previous/next hit targets into the same frame-stage containing the iframe and split it with inset edges so Safari landscape hit areas exactly match the rendered slide.
acceptance_criteria: Overlay bounds are defined by the iframe frame, left and right targets cover exactly half without overflow, responsive tests pass, and live tunnel verification succeeds.
close_reason: Added justify-content:center to the viewer stage, verified targeted and full suites, and confirmed the live Tunnel serves the centered rule.

title: Implement responsive mobile viewer controls and gesture overlays
description: Match the selected mobile viewer mockup: keep slides large, use a landscape utility rail, subtle absolute page count, transparent half-slide click targets, swipe navigation, and landscape fullscreen behavior from portrait mobile.
acceptance_criteria: Landscape keeps slide height with utility controls on the right; page count is a subtle overlay; transparent left/right hit targets and swipe navigate; portrait mobile fullscreen attempts landscape orientation; tests and visual QA pass.
close_reason: Implemented responsive utility rail, subtle page overlay, transparent half-slide tap targets, swipe navigation, and portrait-mobile landscape fullscreen locking; tests and design QA pass.

title: Fix mobile viewer viewport and control spacing
description: Use modern viewport units and safe-area insets so viewer controls have comfortable spacing and do not overlap mobile Safari navigation UI in portrait or landscape.
acceptance_criteria: Viewer uses dynamic viewport sizing with a safe fallback; controls respect safe-area insets in portrait and landscape; focused tests pass.
close_reason: Implemented dynamic viewport sizing, safe-area support, in-flow controls, narrow-screen spacing, and portrait/landscape smoke assertions.

title: Expose slide deck renderer as Hono middleware
close_reason: Added honoSlides middleware, exports, tests, and README usage.

title: Add editor page with Cloudflare Agents integration seam
close_reason: Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.

title: Implement MDX-like slide parser and renderer
close_reason: Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.

title: Scaffold Hono Cloudflare Worker slide deck app
close_reason: Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.

title: Polish Japanese docs copy and package manager guidance
description: Review the documentation navigation, headings, body copy, and homepage for unnatural Japanese or generic AI-written phrasing. State that Fire authoring is partly inspired by Slidev, and present supported install commands without implying Bun is required.
acceptance_criteria: Japanese navigation and prose read naturally and use consistent terminology; the authoring guide credits partial Slidev inspiration without implying compatibility; installation guidance covers npm, pnpm, Yarn, and Bun appropriately; homepage copy is concrete and avoids generic marketing claims; docs tests and build pass.
close_reason: Polished Japanese navigation and prose, documented Slidev inspiration, added npm/pnpm/Yarn/Bun guidance, and verified docs checks.

title: Add scheduled Fire positioning and list controls
description: Extend Fire authoring with Slidev-compatible at positioning plus depth and every controls for list reveals. Replace element-count stepping with a resolved reveal schedule, keep existing source-order defaults, and remove redundant GFM configuration copy from the docs.
acceptance_criteria: fire, Fire, and :::fire accept validated absolute and relative at values; mixed absolute and relative schedules resolve correctly; :::fire{each="item"} supports positive depth and every values with predictable grouping; existing syntax remains source-ordered by default; docs use concise GFM and Fire wording; package, docs, and basic example checks pass.
close_reason: Implemented validated at scheduling, list depth/every grouping, concise GFM/Fire docs, and basic example coverage. Full bun run check passes.

title: Add fire attribute authoring for MDX components
description: Implement the recommended fire reservation syntax so a single MDX component can opt into source-ordered reveal with fire or fire="effect", while preserving explicit Fire wrappers for groups and concise directive syntax for Markdown and lists.
acceptance_criteria: Custom MDX components compile with fire and fire="effect" into Fire reveal behavior without receiving the reserved prop; invalid dynamic or inline uses produce clear errors; docs present concise task-based syntax without marketing filler; package, docs, and basic example checks pass.
notes: Implemented fire and fire="effect" as compile-time reserved attributes on block-level custom components. The attribute is removed before component props and compiled to a Fire wrapper. Dynamic, inline, native-element, and Fire self-use boundaries return actionable errors. Updated basic example and concise authoring docs, including custom directive effects. Verified packages/decks typecheck plus 199 tests, docs 19 tests plus production build, and basic 30 tests.
close_reason: Implemented, documented, and verified the recommended fire authoring API.

title: Simplify Fire authoring semantics and effect variables
description: Correct the Fire authoring DX by removing the broken explicit order contract, rendering block-safe markup, documenting the actual relationship to Slidev v-click and v-clicks, and shortening custom effect CSS variables.
acceptance_criteria: Fire renders a block element; order is rejected and source order drives steps; docs accurately compare Fire with current Slidev v-click and v-clicks behavior; custom effects use a concise CSS variable contract; package, docs, and basic example checks pass.
notes: Removed Fire order semantics and data-fire-order runtime sorting; Fire now renders a block div; concise --fire-* effect variables documented; Slidev v-click/v-clicks mapping and unsupported at/depth/every/v-after/hide documented; decks, docs, and basic checks pass.
close_reason: Implemented and verified the simplified Fire authoring contract.

title: Finalize $fire and list fire syntax
description: Choose the final fire authoring syntax for component shorthand and list reveals. Evaluate whether $fire should remain, how to avoid consuming a component-specific effect prop, and whether fragments: list should be replaced by syntax colocated with fire.
design: Use <Fire> as the JSX equivalent of v-click, :::fire for Markdown blocks, and :::fire{each="item"} for item-by-item list reveals. Remove $fire, fragments frontmatter, and fragment-named DOM attributes. Custom effects use arbitrary effect tokens plus --hono-decks-fire-* theme variables.
acceptance_criteria: <Fire>, :::fire, and :::fire{each="item"} compile and advance in source order; $fire is rejected; fragments frontmatter and fragment-named DOM attributes are removed; arbitrary effect names can be styled through documented --hono-decks-fire-* variables; package, docs, and basic example checks pass.
notes: The user explicitly confirmed that backward compatibility is not required. $fire now fails compilation with a direct <Fire> migration message; fragments: list is removed instead of aliased.
close_reason: Fire authoring is consolidated on <Fire>, :::fire, and :::fire{each="item"}; $fire and fragments frontmatter are removed; DOM state uses fire naming; custom effects are documented and covered by CSS-variable tests; all relevant checks pass.

title: Review GFM and fragment authoring DX
description: Determine whether missing GFM support is intentional or incidental, evaluate the current extension surface, and propose a clearer low-friction syntax model for staged content without changing APIs yet.
acceptance_criteria: Review cites the current compiler and public configuration surface, explains the GFM gap and viable support path, compares fragment syntax options, and recommends a staged implementation direction.
close_reason: Confirmed that GFM was implemented on an older divergent remote branch but was not carried into the API redesign, that the current public config has no remark plugin extension hook, and that fragment modes and aliases create avoidable authoring ambiguity. Recommended built-in GFM plus one reveal-oriented syntax before implementation.

title: Refine docs typography and authoring reference
description: Reduce oversized documentation page H1s, add accessible syntax highlighting to docs code blocks, and document the slide syntax actually supported by the compiler without adding decorative or generic UI.
acceptance_criteria: Docs page H1s have a restrained responsive scale; code blocks highlight supported languages while copy retains source text; authoring guide accurately covers Markdown/MDX, frontmatter, fragments, notes, embeds, layouts, and limitations; docs tests and build pass.
close_reason: Reduced documentation page H1 sizing, added language-aware Shiki highlighting with exact-source copy support, expanded the bilingual authoring syntax reference, and verified docs tests/build plus responsive browser layouts.

title: Add Browser Run export recipe to documentation site
description: Add a bilingual Browser Run recipe beside the Satori OGP recipe, covering Wrangler binding, compatibility date, remote local development, typed config, authorization, PDF/PNG routes, and request flow.
acceptance_criteria: Japanese and English configuration docs include a navigable Browser Run export section with tested setup and safety guidance; docs check passes.
close_reason: Added bilingual Browser Run export recipe with binding setup, compatibility and remote requirements, typed authorization, route flow, security guidance, tests, and passing docs check.

title: Deploy OGP example to authenticated Cloudflare account
description: Deploy examples/ogp without --temporary so external OGP crawlers can fetch the page and image, then verify metadata from an external service.
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated deployment succeeds and external fetch confirms OGP metadata and PNG are reachable.
close_reason: Deployed examples/ogp to authenticated tsapp account and verified page, bot user-agent, OGP metadata, and 1200x630 PNG externally.

title: Split view wrapper from fixed presentation renderer
description: Change the deck view route so /:slug returns an iframe-based viewer wrapper, while /:slug/presentation renders the actual slide deck at a fixed 1920x1080 canvas. Acceptance: wrapper contains iframe targeting presentation route and scale logic; presentation route renders deck content with fixed 1920x1080 sizing; production draft/missing deck behavior is preserved; dev live reload continues on the presentation page; tests cover wrapper, presentation route, and draft/missing cases; npm run check passes.
close_reason: Implemented iframe viewer wrapper, fixed-size presentation route, cross-frame controls/state, draft/dev coverage, and passing npm run check.

title: Add local file-based dev app helper/sample
description: Implement the next hono-slides residual item for a local file-based development sample. Acceptance: expose a Node-side helper that wires createLocalDeckIO, buildDeckManifestFromFileSystem, createDevDeckRuntime, createPreviewEventHub, and honoSlidesRouter for a local decks directory; cover dev index/view/edit/save/event routes with tests; document usage in README; npm run check passes.
close_reason: Added createLocalDevSlidesApp helper, filesystem-backed dev router coverage, README usage, and passing check.

title: Add packaging/export CLI for deck manifest compilation
description: Implement a small hono-slides CLI surface for compiling local deck files into a generated manifest module, covering the README residual item for packaging/export usage. Acceptance: command accepts compile/build args for root/out/mount path, writes manifest module, reports deck count, has help/error behavior, and passes npm run check.
close_reason: Added manifest compile CLI, package bin/script, docs, and tests.

title: Explore theme-driven MDX component renderer
description: Prototype the next renderer extension beyond MDX component placeholders. Acceptance: define the component/theme API boundary, keep untrusted component execution out of the default renderer, add tests for at least one theme-provided component render path, and document fallback/warning behavior.

title: Add R2/custom DeckSource sample
description: Add a focused sample showing how remote/R2 assets and a custom DeckSource fit with honoSlidesRouter. Acceptance: sample demonstrates asset existence/signing boundary or documented stubs, keeps R2 specifics outside compile-time Node I/O, includes tests or a documented smoke path, and README residuals point to the sample.
